title: Moments Composition Workspace
summary: Feature parent for a text-first Moments composition workspace with interchangeable first-party visual engines.
content_html:
Moments Composition Workspace

Create a text-first workspace that can arrange stable Moments content through interchangeable visual composition engines.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — desired experience, long-term direction, and product boundaries.
  • Architecture — proposed ownership, extension method, and pressure points.
  • Basic Axis Editor Delivery — the first complete proving outcome.
  • Studio Roadmap — relative importance and later vertical outcomes.

No broad workspace implementation is active. The existing word-axis CSS is a visual proof; the first delivery remains proposed.

Keep broad direction in the concept, structural reasoning in the architecture, and only independently finishable outcomes in delivery documents.
